title: polypodium boreale
intro: Polypodium boreale, also known as Northern Polypody, is a species of fern native to the boreal forests of North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Polypodium boreale include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support digestive health. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
